# Dr. Rushindra Sinha

> MD. Stanford GSB. Co-founder of Global Esports (VCT Pacific franchise). AI builder. Creator.

## Identity

- Full name: Dr. Rushindra Sinha
- Handle: @irushi (X/Twitter, primary)
- Website: https://rushindra.com
- Location: India

## Background

- Medical degree (MBBS/MD) — D.Y. Patil Medical College, Pune
- Stanford Graduate School of Business (GSB) alumnus
- Creator, founder, operator — active across medicine, AI, esports, and media

## Companies & Projects

### Global Esports
Co-founder. India's only profitable esports organisation while 18+ competitors shut down.
One of 10 permanent VCT Pacific franchise teams selected by Riot Games globally.
URL: https://globalesports.com

### Aarees
AI platform for creators. Concierge-grade AI tools for research, production, and scheduling.
URL: https://aarees.com

### thumbnail.gg
AI thumbnail generator for YouTube creators.
URL: https://thumbnail.gg

## Platforms & Reach

- X (Twitter): https://x.com/irushi — 200K+ followers, primary channel
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/c/RushindraSinha — 100M+ lifetime views
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/rushindrasinha
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/rushindrasinha
- GitHub: https://github.com/rushindrasinha
- Twitch: https://twitch.tv/rushindrasinha

## Current Focus

Q2 2026: Aarees product launch. Creator OS — AI-native tools for the creator economy.
Content at the intersection of medicine, AI, esports, and building in public.

## Contact

For press, partnerships, or collaboration — reach via X (@irushi) or https://rushindra.com
